name: 沈睿

costume.typical_outfit: 精致但宽松的少爷常服

visual_reference: 1boy, young ancient chinese child, pale and sickly, intelligent eyes, wearing loose white robes, sad expression, masterpiece
personality: 懂事，孝顺，心思细腻敏感
flaw: 把父母的矛盾归咎于自己
arc: 无实质弧线，作为执念存在

relationships.dynamic: 深深眷恋，是女主重生的唯一动力
relationships.function: 女主前期行为的动机核心
